title: Reverse Proxies, Forwarded Trust, Message Framing, and Smuggling Defense · Language Lens: Forwarded Strip Rebuild
summary: A gateway preserves client Forwarded fields, uses deprecated ReverseProxy.Director, disagrees with an upstream about malformed framing, forwards hop-by-hop fields, and constructs unsafe backend queries. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsgo forwarded strip rebuild increment in proxy rewrite and parser-consistency threat model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Strip untrusted forwarding fields, rebuild them only at trusted hops, constrain backend targets, remove hop-by-hop state, and prevent header spoofing.
Use ReverseProxy.Rewrite with separate inbound and outbound requests, SetURL and reviewed SetXForwarded behavior, and reject deprecated Director trust assumptions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
